explanation: This LTL property states that whenever the autopilot is in the MANEUVER state (pullup = True) and the pilot is in control (standby = True) and sensor data is good (good = True), the autopilot will eventually transition to the STANDBY state (state_is_STANDBY = True). This is captured by the chosen template, which is a simple implication stating that whenever the condition (pullup & standby & good) is true, the autopilot will eventually reach the STANDBY state.
